evidence_boundary: Integration activation plan is a local routing and setup plan. It uses catalog metadata and runtime-scan statuses without printing secret values. It does not prove OAuth validity, API entitlement, live tool availability, market-data correctness, trading performance, remote CI completion, or public superiority.
